title: meerkatx's CustomModelData pack
description: This pack adds a few custom model data items.
body:
# meerkatx's CustomModelData pack
This pack uses custom model data (cmd) to add custom items.
It also removes the nose plate on helmets, and the brown bits on leather armor.

<details>
<summary>CustomModelData values as of v1.3.0</summary>

use this command to get one of the custom items:
/give @s <minecraft item>[minecraft:custom_model_data=<cmd value>]

|item|minecraft item|cmd value|
|---------------------|:---------------------:|---------------------:|
| crystal shard | amethyst_shard | 6 |
| diamond scythe | diamond_hoe | 8 |
| diamond katana | diamond_sword | 1 |
| white book | enchanted_book | 2 |
| blue book | enchanted_book | 3 |
| purple book | enchanted_book | 1 |
| spear | iron_sword | 8 |
| demon scythe | netherite_hoe | 8 |
| demon staff | netherite_shovel | 8 |
| shadow blade | netherite_sword | 1 |
| long stick | stick | 8 |
| dagger | stone_sword | 8 |
| fancy diamond sword | diamond_sword | 3 |
| fancy diamond axe | diamond_axe | 3 |
| fancy diamond pickaxe | diamond_pickaxe | 3 |
| blocking dagger | shield | 1 |
| gilded netherite helmet | carved_pumpkin | 1 |

extra: fancy diamond axes, swords & picks can be worn in the head slot to make them appear on the player's back.
use this command to put the item in your mainhand on your head:
/item replace entity @s armor.head from entity @s weapon.mainhand

</details>


If you are making a datapack (or mod) and would like to use this pack or any of it's textures, feel free, though please give credit, and a link back to this modrinth page.

note:
this pack was originally made for personal use, so certain items may not be added ie: stone, iron, gold versions of scythes and katanas.
